title: Automatic communication control
abstract: The present invention relates to a method for automatically controlling communication between nodes. The present invention also relates to a corresponding system and use of such system. The method comprises the following method steps: providing target data of targets comprising i) a plurality of target IDs and ii) target profile assigned to each target ID; providing seeker data of seekers comprising i) a plurality of seeker IDs and ii) a seeker profile assigned to each seeker ID; automatically determining a proximity value that is representative for the proximity between at least one target profile and at least one seeker profile; and automatically analyzing the target and the seeker profiles, and automatically suggesting at least one optimizing step to improve the proximity value. The system comprises at least one communication component (1a) configured to enable communication between a target node (20-23) assigned to a target and a seeker node (10-12); at least one proximity component (1b) configured to automatically determine a proximity value that is representative for the proximity between at least one target profile and at least one seeker profile; and at least one optimizing component (1c) configured to automatically analyze the target and the seeker profiles and to automatically suggest at least one optimizing step to improve the proximity value.
claims:
Claims Claims 1. A method for automatically controlling communication between nodes, the method comprising the following method steps a . providing target data of targets comprising i . a plurality of target IDs; ii . target profile assigned to each target ID; b. providing seeker data of seekers comprising i . a plurality of seeker IDs; ii . a seeker profile assigned to each seeker ID; c. automatically determining a proximity value that is representative for the proximity between at least one target profile and at least one seeker profile; and d . automatically analyzing the target and the seeker profiles and e. automatica lly suggesting at least one optimizing step to improve the proximity value. 2. The method according to the preceding claim wherein a proximity component ( lb) is provided and configured to automatically determine a proximity value that is representative for the proximity between at least one ta rget profile a nd at least one seeker profile. 3. The method according to any of the preceding claims wherein an optimizing component ( lc) is provided and configured to automatically execute at least one of determining a proximity value that is representative for the proximity between at least one target profile and at least one seeker profile; analyzing the target and the seeker profiles to automatically suggest at least one optimizing step to improve the proximity value; suggesting at least on optimizing step for optimizing the seeker profile to improve the proximity value; a nd/or suggesting at least one optimizing step for optimizing the seeker profile to improve the proximity value upon request of the respective seeker and/or the target; and/or suggesting at least one distinct optimizing step to improve the proximity value to compensate any difference between the target and seeker profiles or to overfulfill the d ifference; wherein preferably a complexity value is assigned to at least one, preferably all optimizing steps. 4. The method according to any of the preceding claims wherein each target ID is assigned a target node (20-23) and each seeker ID is assigned a seeker node (10- 12). 5. The method according to the preceding claim wherein the optimizing component (lc) is configured to automatically analyze or determine the difference between a seeker profile and a target profile and to automatically check and read out relevant optimizing steps from a first database (3) and to feed back the relevant optimizing steps to the target node (20-23) and/or the seeker node (10-12). 6. The method according to any of the preceding claims wherein the data of the targets and the data of the seekers are supplied from a second database (2). 7. The method according to any of the preceding claims wherein the first and/or the second databases (2,3) and/or the optimizing database (3) are cloud-based. 8. The method according to any of the preceding claims comprising a communication component (la) that is configured to enable communication between a target node (20-23) assigned to a target and a seeker node (10-12) assigned to a seeker in case the respective proximity value is exceeding a threshold value. 9. The method according to the preceding claim wherein the threshold value can be set by at least one of each target node (20-23) individually; and each seeker node (10-12) individually, and threshold value is a dynamic value that can be adapted to at least one of the number of targets and number of seekers, and wherein the threshold value is automatically adapted by at least one of a neural network; an artificial intelligence-implemented data analyzer; and a computer-implemented data analysis of inner products. 10. The method according to any of the preceding claims wherein the communication component (la) is configured to execute at least one of the steps of providing a graphic representation of the plurality of seekers (10-12) to one target (20-23); sorting the seekers according to the proximity value; and/or sorting the seekers in correlation to the proximity value; and/or 

 sorting the seekers according to the complexity value; and/or sorting the seekers in counter-correlation to the complexity value; and/or sorting the seekers according to the proximity value and the complexity value. 11. The method according to any of the preceding claims wherein at least one of the seeker profile and the target profile contain data representative of a plurality of different profile categories and wherein the different profile categories comprise any of certificates and/or analytic data originating from the seeker. 12. The method according to any of the preceding claims wherein the optimizing component (lc) is configured to access data from an optimizing database, the optimizing database containing distinct programs to optimize seeker profiles to target profiles and wherein the optimizing component is configured to suggest one or more programs to optimize seeker profiles to target profiles. 13. The method according to any of the preceding claims wherein the seeker profiles are safely stored and certified by a safe database (2). 14. The method according to the preceding claim wherein the safe database is block- chain based. 15. The method according to the preceding claim wherein the blockchain is at least one of: a consortium blockchain and a private blockchain. 16. The method according to any of the preceding claims wherein optimizing steps are automatically generated by an optimizing generator. 17. The method according to the preceding claim wherein the optimizing generator generates an optimizing step when there is more than one common difference between a target profile and a seeker profile. 18. A system for automatically controlling communication between nodes, the system comprising at least one communication component (la) configured to enable communication between a target node (20-23) assigned to a target and a seeker node (10-12); at least one proximity component (lb) configured to automatically determine a proximity value that is representative for the proximity between at least one target profile and at least one seeker profile; and 

 at least one optimizing component (lc) configured to automatically analyze the target and the seeker profiles and to automatically suggest at least one optimizing step to improve the proximity value. 19. The system according to the preceding claim, wherein the optimizing component (lc) is configured to automatically execute any of the steps of determining a proximity value that is representative for the proximity between at least one target profile and at least one seeker profile; analyzing the target and the seeker profiles and to automatically suggest at least one optimizing step to improve the proximity value; suggesting at least on optimizing step for optimizing the seeker profile to improve the proximity value; and/or suggesting at least on optimizing step for optimizing the seeker profile to improve the proximity value upon request of the respective seeker and/or the target; and/or suggesting at least one distinct optimizing step to improve the proximity value to compensate any difference between the target and seeker profiles or to overfulfill the difference; and/or analyzing and/or determining the difference between a seeker profile and a target profile and to automatically check and read out relevant optimizing steps from a first database (3) to feed back the relevant optimizing steps to a target node (20-23) assigned to a target ID and/or a seeker node (10-12) assigned to a seeker ID. 20. The system according to any of the preceding claims, wherein the communication component (la) is configured to automatically execute any of the steps enabling communication between a target node (20-23) assigned to a target and a seeker node (10-12) assigned to a seeker in case the respective proximity value is exceeding a threshold value; and/or providing a graphic representation of the plurality of seekers (10-12) to one target (20-23); and/or sorting the seekers according to the proximity value; and/or sorting the seekers in correlation to the proximity value; and/or sorting the seekers according to the complexity value; and/or sorting the seekers in counter-correlation to the complexity value; and/or sorting the seekers according to the proximity value and the complexity value. 21. The system according to the preceding claim wherein the communication component is configured to enable communication between a target and a seeker after a distinct program from the optimizing database has been booked. 2. The system according to the preceding claim wherein the communication component (la) is configured to enable communication between the target and the seeker after a distinct program from the optimizing database has been booked by a seeker.
